Medical.Perscription: Spironolactone x70 bi-monthly :: Aldosterone Inhibitor as a cardiac regulator
Medical.Notes: Patient suffers an acute case of Angina - blood flow for oxygen delivery to the heart is dramatically lower than usual due to vascular defects evident since birth. Patient is outfitted with a regulating monitor that can alert him when SpO2 is low, as he is of much greater risk of heart failure, and must react quickly. This is not a pacemaker, but merely an early alarm system.
